prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约17614、36535、36406、34819、32190名。2022年因专业组调整出现大幅后移，此后逐年回升（位次数字减小），近3年累计 前移约4345名，2025年基准约32190名；2021–2025年物理类招生计划均为26人，2026年计划仍为26人，计划人数连续6年持平。但本省物理类考生从2021 年16.6万增至2025年26.1万，2026年估算约38.0万，考生基数大幅扩大，实际录取竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属军事院校体系；软科主榜未 进入前200名（军校未纳入排名），学校层次稳定；声誉舆情数据中无该校显著负面或正面事件记录；抖音热度总排名第9（高热），综合热度532万，短视频曝 光量高，反映报考关注度较高；未见投档断档历史记录。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业整体热 度较高，临床医学2024年热指数70.19（推荐），护理学68.61（推荐），口腔医学72.31（推荐），医学大类报考意愿持续旺盛；本省物理类考生2026年估算约38.0万人，较2025 年增幅约45.7%，竞争压力显著增大；省控线（本科批）从2021年417分升至2025年463分，整体录取门槛持续提高；学校位于上海市，对江苏省考生具有较强地 域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划持平但考生基数大幅扩大 、医学专业整体高热、抖音关注度高等因素，预计2026年竞争进一步加剧，位次将继续前移。预测最低位次约31690名，区间31190–32190名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17614, 36535, 36406, 34819, and 32190 respectively. In 2022, due to adjustments in major groups, there was a significant backward shift, followed by a gradual recovery in subsequent years (decreasing ranking numbers). Over the past 3 years, the ranking has moved forward by approximately 4345 places, with a baseline of about 32190 in 2025. The enrollment plan for Physics Category remained at 26 students from 2021 to 2025, and it will remain at 26 in 2026, with the plan unchanged for 6 consecutive years. However, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 380,000 in 2026. The significant expansion of the examinee base has markedly intensified actual admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, belonging to the military academy system. It is not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main ranking (military academies are not included in the ranking), and the school level is stable. There are no records of significant negative or positive events in the reputation sentiment data. On Douyin, it ranks 9th in overall popularity (high heat), with a comprehensive popularity of 5.32 million, indicating high short video exposure and reflecting relatively high attention from applicants. No historical records of enrollment gaps have been observed.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors generally have high popularity. In 2024, the heat index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), Nursing 68.61 (recommended), and Stomatology 72.31 (recommended), indicating sustained strong willingness to apply for medical majors. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in the province in 2026 is about 380,000, an increase of approximately 45.7% compared to 2025, significantly increasing competitive pressure. The provincial control line (undergraduate batch) rose from 417 points in 2021 to 463 points in 2025, with the overall admission threshold continuously increasing. The university is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Jiangsu applicants.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026 but significantly expanded examinee base, the overall high popularity of medical majors, and high attention on Douyin, it is expected that competition will further intensify in 2026, and the ranking will continue to move forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31690, with a range of 31190 to 32190.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31190–32190, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 31000), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 majors such as Clinical Medicine. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 32000), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Nursing and Chinese Materia Medica to increase admission probability.
